subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord and my Hope! Thou knowest that this Wronged One yearneth to make mention of the son of him who hath turned towards Thy horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی و رجائی تعلم بان المظلوم یحب ان یذکر ابن من اقبل الی افقک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God
